failures.description: The agent misread or misused the ProductCatalogSearch result and selected the last/highest-priced item instead of the first/lowest-priced item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The required tool call was made correctly, and the relevant tool output was available at index 3. The tool result is sorted ascending by price and shows item 1240311797 at $137.17 as the cheapest. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming item 2243454707 at $164.46 was cheapest, contradicting the tool output.
